title: Number Sense Foundations
description: Revisit place value, rounding, and mental addition strategies to build confidence with numbers.
activities: Watch a short explainer on place value
Complete 5 quick estimation challenges
Log one real-life example of mental math

title: Problem-Solving Warmups
description: Use multi-step reasoning to solve contextualised puzzles and word problems.
activities: Solve three scenario-based puzzles
Reflect on which heuristics worked best
Create a mini-puzzle to share with a friend

title: Modeling with Data
description: Use proportional reasoning to interpret graphs and build a simple predictive model.
activities: Analyse a real-world dataset snapshot
Build a quick estimate using ratios
Draft one lingering question for deeper study

title: Scientific Observation Sprint
description: Practice noticing and describing phenomena with the language of science.
activities: Observe an everyday object and record detailed notes
Identify the variables you could test
Summarise findings in two sentences

title: Mini Experiments Lab
description: Design and reflect on bite-sized experiments that emphasise cause and effect.
activities: Choose a home-friendly experiment prompt
Document predictions versus outcomes
Share one insight with a peer or journal

title: Systems Thinking Challenge
description: Trace feedback loops and energy flow within an ecosystem or engineered system.
activities: Map the components of the chosen system
Highlight two feedback loops
Identify a leverage point for change

title: History as Story
description: Reconstruct a historical moment by piecing together perspectives and primary clues.
activities: Skim a short historical vignette
List the voices represented and missing
Write a 3-sentence retelling

title: Causation Detective
description: Investigate chain reactions that led to a major event and critique different interpretations.
activities: Build a cause-and-consequence diagram
Assess the strength of two sources
Pose a counterfactual question

title: Global Connections Seminar
description: Trace how ideas, trade, and culture travelled across regions and shaped new possibilities.
activities: Annotate a historical map
Compare two cultural exchanges
Record an insight relevant to today
